subcodes.first_line: O loved ones of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, His honour 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn Khán hath forsaken his native land and wandereth upon the mountains [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیزان عبدالبهاء جناب عبدالحسین خان وطن مالوف را فراموش نمود و سرگشته کوه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
